name: Revivify

components.material: a diamond worth 300+ GP, which the spell consumes

description: You touch a creature that has died within the last minute; it revives with 1 Hit Point. The spell can't revive a creature that died of old age or restore missing body parts. Engine: there is no dead-ally revival flow yet, so this is descriptive — the existing heal resolver already revives a downed (0 HP) ally.
